plan_markdown.description: Full text of the revised plan as markdown.

issues.description: Each original critique issue receives a verdict. Preserve order and ids.

verdict.description: accept — apply it; reject_hallucinated — evidence is false or missing; reject_out_of_scope — outside the plan's scope; reject_taste — taste-only with no justification; downgrade — keep it but lower the severity; duplicate_of_prior — already rejected in rejected-log.

verdict_reason.description: One sentence. Required for any reject_* and for downgrade.

final_severity.description: Final severity after judgment. For reject_* it equals the original but does not count toward the stop tally.

duplicate_of.description: Id of the rejected-log.jsonl entry when verdict=duplicate_of_prior, otherwise null.

applied.description: Ids of the issues that were applied to the plan.

rejected_append.description: Issues the creator rejected despite the critic's accept. Allowed only for minor/nit.

reason.description: Allowed values: not_value_adding | conflicts_with: C<id> | out_of_plan_scope | requires_external_decision
